summary: Iteration 25 - Testing 4 major changes: (1) Nav bar Saved link removal, (2) 4 tool page schema fixes, (3) University context system, (4) Referral system. Backend: 14/15 tests passed (health endpoint 404 is non-critical). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with test@simplifii.com works
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns university, studyYear, faculty, referralCode fields
Backend: PUT /api/user/profile accepts university, studyYear, faculty fields
Backend: Profile update requires authentication (401)
Backend: User has referral code in SIM-XXXXXX format
Backend: POST /api/user/redeem-referral with invalid code returns 404
Backend: POST /api/user/redeem-referral with own code returns 400
Backend: Redeem referral requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/user/complete-onboarding endpoint works
Backend: POST /api/user/pain-point endpoint works
Backend: POST /api/rubric/simplify endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/concept/visualise endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/decode-jargon endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/scaffold endpoint exists
Frontend FIX 1: Nav bar does NOT show 'Saved' link
Frontend FIX 1: Profile dropdown HAS 'Saved Outputs' link
Frontend FIX 1: Profile dropdown shows referral code (SIM-86AB9F) with 'Click to copy'
Frontend FIX 2: Rubric Simplifier page renders with rubric text input, submit button, optional brief upload
Frontend FIX 2: Concept Visualiser page renders with concept input, visualise button, ELI5 toggle
Frontend FIX 2: Hidden Curriculum Decoder page renders with jargon input, decode button
Frontend FIX 2: Assessment Scaffolder page renders with all 4 document upload zones (Brief, Rubric, Outline, Slides)
Frontend FIX 3: Onboarding modal appears for users with hasCompletedOnboarding=false
Frontend FIX 3: Onboarding Step 2 shows 'Tell Us About You' with University dropdown, Year Level dropdown, Faculty input
Frontend FIX 3: University dropdown has 9 grouped options (NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, SA, ACT, TAS, NT, Other)
Frontend FIX 3: Settings page shows University section with dropdown, year level, faculty
Frontend FIX 3: Settings page shows Referral Program section with code display (SIM-86AB9F), copy button, redeem input
critical_code_review_comments: ConceptVisualiser.js: Fixed missing tourSteps variable that was causing undefined reference
Navigation.js: Correctly removed 'Saved' from nav links array, kept 'Saved Outputs' in profile dropdown
Settings.js: University section properly uses UNIVERSITY_GROUPS with optgroups, referral section shows code with copy functionality
Dashboard.js: Onboarding modal step 2 correctly shows university form with all 3 fields
universities.js: Contains 9 state groups with comprehensive Australian university list
auth.py: referralCode generation uses SIM-{6 hex chars} format, redeem-referral validates own code and invalid codes correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user. Reset hasCompletedOnboarding=false for onboarding modal testing.

mocked_apis.note: All endpoints are real. Stripe payments in TESTING_MODE.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 complete. Four major changes verified: (1) FIX 1 - Nav bar no longer shows 'Saved' link, profile dropdown has 'Saved Outputs' and referral code display. (2) FIX 2 - All 4 tool pages (RubricSimplifier, ConceptVisualiser, HiddenCurriculumDecoder, AssessmentScaffolder) render their input forms correctly without errors. (3) FIX 3 - University context system working: Settings page has University section with grouped dropdown (9 Australian state groups), Year Level dropdown, Faculty input. Onboarding modal step 2 shows same university form. (4) Referral system working: Users have SIM-XXXXXX format codes, Settings page shows code with copy button and redeem input. Backend validates invalid codes (404) and own codes (400). Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123 with referral code SIM-86AB9F. Note: Fixed missing tourSteps in ConceptVisualiser.js.
